_comment: What training produces — checkpoints, log stream, streaming metrics. Differs from infer/eval in that metrics are emitted continuously during a long run, not just at the end.

checkpoints._comment: Models saved during training. selection.best_by + direction tells /train-run and downstream stages which ckpt is canonical.

metrics._comment: Streamed during training. Two granularities — step (high-freq, e.g. loss/lr) and epoch (low-freq, used for ckpt selection). primary_metric drives 'best' decisions.
